---
name: browser-setup
description: Install the official browser automation CLI and its dependencies.
---

# Browser Setup

## Prerequisites

This tool requires Node.js 20 and pnpm.

Install the official package and browser dependencies:

```bash
pnpm add -g agent-browser
agent-browser install --with-deps
```

See the official repository for release notes: https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser
